speaker: Diederich
text: Hey, Argo. How’s it feel to finally be back at sea? *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: Ah... Professor Derich! It's just as exciting as I remember! *sigh*

speaker: Diederich
text: Isn't it? I thought you’d get a kick out of this too.

speaker: Argo
text: What? This is all for me...?

speaker: Diederich
text: Oh, no! That’s not what I meant! You’re just the icing on the cake!

speaker: Diederich
text: Professors can’t play favorites, right? *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: (He’s terrible at hiding his embarrassment…)

speaker: Diedereich
text: Well, like I said, there’s nothing on the agenda for the first day.

speaker: Diederich
text: Wanna take a look at the ship? She’s a fine vessel.

speaker: Argo
text: Good idea, I'm interested too.

speaker: Argo
text: The rocking of the boat and the smell of the seawater really make it feel like we’re back home, huh? *sigh*

speaker: Diederich
text: They sure do! Maybe we should just leave the Knights College behind!

speaker: Argo
text: I don’t think Professor Celio would be very happy about that. *sigh*

speaker: Diederich
text: ...Yeah, you’re right.

speaker: Argo
text:
It’s too bad “seaside” already means something else. 
That'd be like our version of "homesick".

speaker: Diederich
text: "Haaah… I know… I don’t wanna go back on land…"

speaker: Diederich
text: Why don’t the two of us just steal a dinghy and go off on our own? *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: You’re joking, right?

speaker: Diederich
text: Course I am. *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: For what it’s worth, I don’t think you’d abandon your students. *sigh*

speaker: Diederich
text: Oh...? And how are you so sure?

speaker: Argo
text: I haven’t known you for very long, but I just get the feeling you wouldn't*.

speaker: Argo
text: Oh yeah, didn’t you say Ludvigo also has a dragon?

speaker: Diederich
text: That’s right. He’s on this ship too.

speaker: Argo
text: What!? W-We’re on the same ship as a dragon!?

speaker: Diedereich
text: Yep, he wanted to take a look at the next generation of knights. *

speaker: Argo
text: W-Wow...

speaker: Diederich
text: I was gonna introduce him to everyone at dinner, but do you wanna meet him before that? *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: Am I allowed?

speaker: Diederich
text: Why not? He’s not a tightass about stuff like that.

speaker: Argo
text: Lord Scheat is pretty relaxed too... *sigh*

speaker: Diederich
text: Ah ~, he's probably not even close to Baten.

speaker: Argo
text: (He’s even more relaxed than Lord Scheat…?)

speaker: Argo
text: Is there anything I should be careful about? *sigh*

speaker: Diederich
text: Not really. Hell, I even kinda shot him the first time we met. *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: What…?

speaker: Diederich
text: But if he’ll let even that slide, I’m sure you can do what ever you want!

speaker: Argo
text: (Th-That’s… one heck of a greeting…)

speaker: Argo
text: Being out here in the sea breeze reminds me of how sticky it makes my body. *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: As soon as it starts raining I’m going to go out on the deck and take my clothes off... *sigh*

speaker: Diederich
text: Hm? Ah, that’s right… You couldn’t take baths on fishin’ boats, huh?

speaker: Argo
text: I didn't get very many opportunities to wash myself in fresh water.

speaker: Diederich
text: Don’t worry, there’s a bath on this ship. *sigh*

speaker: Argo
text: Oh! There is?

speaker: Diederich
text: Not only that, but it’s a pretty nice one. Probably even better than some of the ones you find on land.

speaker: Argo
text: I—I have to see it...! *sigh*

speaker: Diederich
text: Then go check it out later. It’s on the stern.

speaker: Argo
text: Okay! I will!!!

speaker: Argo
text: (I wonder if it’s time to move…) *

speaker: Argo
text: Well then, I’m going to have a look around. *sigh*

speaker: Diederich
text: Sure. Have fun.
